bugs.title: Desktop orientation detection blocks game entirely
bugs.description: Game uses window.screen.orientation.type to detect orientation. In a desktop browser (even with portrait viewport 390x844), screen.orientation.type reports 'landscape-primary', causing the rotate-overlay to permanently block game access. Game is unplayable on desktop without JS injection to hide the overlay.
steps_to_reproduce: Open game in desktop browser at default viewport (e.g. 1280x720)
Observe 'Please rotate your phone to portrait mode' overlay
Overlay remains visible - screen.orientation still reports landscape-primary
bugs.expected: Game detects portrait viewport via window.innerWidth < window.innerHeight comparison
bugs.actual: Uses screen.orientation API which reflects physical screen, not browser viewport
bugs.impact: All desktop users cannot play the game

bugs.title: Repeated 'Texture key already in use' errors on every wave transition
bugs.description: Phaser fires 'Texture key already in use' errors for item_milk, item_yogurt, item_vegetable, item_juice, item_cheese, item_frozen on each wave. textures.addBase64() is async - the textures.exists() guard passes before texture is fully registered, causing re-registration attempts on the same keys. Results in 'Cannot read properties of null (reading source)' uncaught TypeErrors.
console_errors_observed: Texture key already in use: item_milk
Texture key already in use: item_yogurt
Texture key already in use: item_vegetable
Texture key already in use: item_juice
Texture key already in use: item_cheese
Texture key already in use: item_frozen
Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'source') (x10)
bugs.root_cause: Race condition in _preloadTextures/_spawnItem: textures.exists() check is synchronous but addBase64() is async, allowing duplicate registration
bugs.impact: Console spam, potential rendering failures, items may show as broken black squares

bugs.title: Broken texture rendering - black boxes with green borders in grid
bugs.description: After multiple game restarts (start->play->die->retry spam), game items render as black rectangles with green borders instead of their proper SVG images. Directly caused by BUG-002 texture key conflicts breaking the Phaser texture cache.
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate back to menu and play again
After 2-3 restart cycles, black boxes appear in the game grid
bugs.expected: All fridge items render with their correct SVG artwork
bugs.actual: Items render as black filled rectangles with green debug borders
bugs.impact: Core visual experience broken after multiple plays, items unidentifiable

bugs.title: Broken image/black box visible on main menu screen
bugs.description: A black box with green border appears below the SHOP button on the main menu. Appears to be a mis-placed canvas element or broken asset preview on the menu scene.
bugs.impact: Visual glitch on menu, but does not block gameplay

bugs.title: favicon.ico 404 error
bugs.description: Server returns 404 for /favicon.ico. Minor but adds noise to console.

bugs.title: Game starts mid-session when overlay is bypassed (Wave 3 on first load)
bugs.description: When the rotate overlay is forcibly hidden via JS, the game appears to already be running at Wave 3 with score 250, suggesting the game loop starts behind the overlay rather than waiting for proper initialization. May indicate state management issue between menu and game scenes.
bugs.impact: If orientation detection is fixed, first-load experience may skip early waves or enter inconsistent state

performance.notes: Game runs smoothly once loaded. Wave transitions are fast. Score increments responsively. No frame drops detected during rapid interaction. Load time acceptable. Docked for texture errors causing processing overhead each wave.

console_cleanliness.notes: 21 console errors total across session. Repeated uncaught TypeErrors and Phaser texture key errors on every wave. Completely unclean.

edge_case_handling.notes: Ad prompts appear correctly on continue/retry. Idle behavior stable (game ran to wave 9 while idle). Game-over flow works. However orientation detection completely fails for desktop env. Restart spam causes visual breakage.

verdict_summary: Fridge Tetris has a critical desktop orientation detection bug that makes the game unplayable without JS hacks, combined with a persistent texture loading race condition that causes console errors and visual breakage (black boxes) after multiple play cycles. The core mechanic works once the orientation barrier is bypassed, but the texture system is fundamentally broken. These issues require fixes before release.
what_works: Score tracking and NEW RECORD detection work
Game-over screen and retry flow functional
Ad prompt integration present and non-blocking
Idle stability - game runs without crashing when left unattended
priority_fixes: FIX-1 [CRITICAL]: Replace screen.orientation check with window.innerWidth < window.innerHeight for orientation detection
FIX-2 [HIGH]: Fix texture key race condition - use Phaser loader queue or check textures.get(key)?.source before addBase64, or pre-register all textures once in a true preload phase
FIX-3 [HIGH]: Fix broken texture rendering on restart (black boxes) - likely fixed by FIX-2
FIX-4 [LOW]: Remove or reposition stray canvas element from main menu
